title: Molten Slovakian Udon Noodles
description: A satvik-friendly Slovakian dish featuring fermented udon noodles and toast, perfect for a crowd-pleasing dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
Cook the udon noodles according to package instructions
Toast the bread until it is lightly browned
In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, toasted bread, sauerkraut, and shredded vegan cheese
In a small bowl, mix together the caraway seeds and paprika
Sprinkle the caraway seed mixture over the noodle mixture
Drizzle the olive oil over the top of the noodle mixture
Transfer the noodle mixture to a baking dish and bake for 20 minutes
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving
